title: Human Body and Food Practice Test

questions.questionText: Which organ pumps blood through our body?
questions.explanation: The heart pumps blood to all parts of the body.

questions.questionText: Which food group gives us energy?
questions.explanation: Carbohydrates like rice and bread give us energy.

questions.questionText: How many sense organs do we have?
questions.explanation: We have five sense organs: eyes, ears, nose, tongue, and skin.

questions.questionText: Which organ helps us breathe?
questions.explanation: Lungs help us breathe in oxygen and breathe out carbon dioxide.

questions.questionText: Which vitamin do we get from sunlight?
questions.explanation: Our body makes Vitamin D when our skin gets sunlight.

questions.questionText: Where does digestion of food start?
questions.explanation: Digestion starts in the mouth when we chew food.

questions.questionText: Which food helps build strong bones?
questions.explanation: Milk has calcium which helps build strong bones.

questions.questionText: Which sense organ helps us smell?
questions.explanation: The nose helps us smell different scents.

questions.questionText: What do we need to drink to stay healthy?
questions.explanation: Water is essential for our body. We need it every day.

questions.questionText: Which organ controls our body?
questions.explanation: The brain controls our thoughts, movements, and body functions.

questions.questionText: Which food is rich in protein?
questions.explanation: Eggs are rich in protein which helps our muscles grow.

questions.questionText: How many bones are in an adult human body?
questions.explanation: An adult human has about 206 bones in the body.

questions.questionText: Which sense organ helps us taste?
questions.explanation: The tongue helps us taste sweet, sour, salty, and bitter.

questions.questionText: Which vegetable is good for our eyes?
questions.explanation: Carrots have Vitamin A which is good for our eyes.

questions.questionText: What protects our brain?
questions.explanation: The skull is a hard bone that protects our brain.

questions.questionText: Which food should we eat less of?
questions.explanation: Junk food like chips and candy should be eaten less often.

questions.questionText: Which organ filters waste from our blood?
questions.explanation: Kidneys filter waste from blood and make urine.

questions.questionText: What do fruits give us?
questions.explanation: Fruits give us vitamins, minerals, and fiber.

questions.questionText: Which sense organ helps us hear?
questions.explanation: Ears help us hear sounds around us.

questions.questionText: Where does food go after we swallow?
questions.explanation: Food goes down to the stomach where digestion continues.

questions.questionText: Which meal is the most important to start the day?
questions.explanation: Breakfast gives us energy to start the day well.

questions.questionText: Which part of our body helps us touch and feel?
questions.explanation: Our skin helps us feel hot, cold, soft, and rough.

questions.questionText: Which food group helps build muscles?
questions.explanation: Proteins from eggs, meat, and dal help build muscles.

questions.questionText: How many teeth does an adult usually have?
questions.explanation: An adult usually has 32 teeth including wisdom teeth.

questions.questionText: Why should we eat a balanced diet?
options: To get all nutrients we need
questions.explanation: A balanced diet gives us all the nutrients for growth and health.
